# Pull Request Template

## Description
Provide a summary of the changes introduced by this PR.

## Checks
*   [ ] I have executed `pnpm test` locally and all tests passed.
*   [ ] I have executed `pnpm lint` locally and formatting checks passed.
*   [ ] No credentials or private API keys are checked in.
*   [ ] This PR aligns with specifications defined in `SPEC.md`.
